item.title: MEME DUMP WITHOUT POLITICS OR BOTS VOL 77
item.description:
"The hopeless don't revolt, because revolution is an act of hope." ― Pyotr Kropotkin Track of this dump: Recloose feat. Joe Dukie – Dust https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ajg7tNE9rdg I’ve been informed that some people don’t like me posting Spotify links to the tracks on these dumps, because apparently Spotify is eviler than YouTube due to Joe Rogan. Imgur baffles me sometimes, honestly. But sure, from now on if the songs are available on yt I’ll post that link instead. Vol 76 found here: https://imgur.com/gallery/meme-dump-without-politics-bots-vol-76-1uPYmpm
Art: Rob W Jones.
Art: Wayan Bayu.
From the actual Japanese tv series Kamen Rider X, ep 26 named "Underworld's Dictator, Starfish Hitler!!" (1974).
item.dc:creator: NinjaCongo

item.title: See what happens when you put a socialist in charge?
item.description:
https://thedeepdive.ca/mexicos-president-sheinbaum-decrees-universal-healthcare-for-120-million/
Put socialists in charge and even poor countries can get universal healthcare. Put liberals in charge… and you might wind up with the ACA, which they use as a cudgel to beat their voters with anytime they ask for more like Hillary and Biden did…

item.title: Memes/tomfoolery
item.description:
"do you think it'll work?" "It would take a miracle. WAKA WAKA!!!"
I automatically assumed this guy was British. Where do you even find peas in the US?
All cops!
I have no words to describe how angry I am
"That's all folks!"

item.title: My posts have been going viral - I was able to become an independent artist!
item.description:
I was in professional galleries for 10 years but after a few posts went viral I was able to go independent and self-represent my artwork. I just took back possession of my drawings! I'm so grateful to you for all of your support! Below are some of my drawings that I'm now able to sell to collectors directly.
Cat Tax! ^My cat Mabel You can see some of my available prints here - https://emilycopeland.com/prints/ Have an incredible day!
item.dc:creator: emilycopelandartistry

item.title: You cannot get it on a boat, you cannot get it in a tree, you cannot just spontaneously contract an STD
item.description:
This showed up on my Reddit feed. Provided this is real, I felt truly terrible for this guy - I covered his name to protect his privacy because he’s having a hard enough time as is. However, I also felt like his post was a good opportunity to spread STD awareness. STDs are often undetectable at first. Not finding out about the STD until it shows up on a screening is a tale as old as time. HIV, for example, is notorious for not having symptoms for the first few years. Many people don’t find out that they have it until the blood test confirms it. Genital herpes is another STD that can go undetected because the person isn’t experiencing symptoms. However, regardless of the STD, this simple truth remains: It will almost always show up in a screening.
ANY virus screening, whether it’s COVID, STDs, the flu, etc… is looking to see if the virus is inside your body, regardless of whether you’re having symptoms or not. While tests can make mistakes, it’s never truly the case that the virus comes and goes as it pleases. STDs also don’t have sentience where they decide which partners they want to infect and which they don’t. If you have an STD and have unprotected sex with someone, they will get that STD. If you sleep with another person, they will also get that STD. If you have an STD but don’t have any symptoms, you’ll still test positive for that STD. There is never a moment in time where the infection isn’t in your body, it’s just a matter of whether it’s causing you problems or not. And the virus will still spread, even if it’s not causing you problems. And if you tested negative for an STD, you don’t have that STD in your body at all.
It’s very rare, but testing flukes happen. There have been false negatives before, as well as false positives. When I was 18, my doctor’s office made an error, and I was falsely diagnosed with herpes simplex. The problem was that this was the genital kind, and I was still a virgin. A second test came back negative. The CDC doesn’t recommend getting a screening for genital herpes if you don’t have symptoms for that reason - there’s a higher risk of a false result . However, testing flukes are easily fixed by getting retested. If you’re worried that you have an STD that the lab missed, you can take a second screening. If that second screening is negative, you definitely don’t have that STD.
There are STDs that can be transmitted through non-sexual acts: Herpes simplex 2 is the virus that causes cold sores, and is spread through skin contact. This is why you never kiss anyone when you have a cold sore, ESPECIALLY babies!! Hepatitis and HIV can be spread via contaminated blood or mucous membranes, which don’t require sexual acts Pubic lice can be contracted just by sleeping in a contaminated bed, or sharing towels with someone that has it. Syphilis can be spread through contact with the sores it causes. If these sores are on the mouth, you don’t necessarily need to be enraged in a sexual act to get it. That being said, getting syphilis through anything other than sex is possible, but VERY UNLIKELY. . Chlamydia can only be contracted through a sexual act. This can include oral sex, penetrative sex, sharing sex toys, or rubbing genitalia together. You don’t get it from a toilet seat. . Gonorrhea is almost exclusively spread via sexual contact. It can also be spread to babies if the mother has gonorrhea while giving birth.
Life isn’t black and white. False results do happen. Labs can make mistakes. It doesn’t hurt to get a second screening if you have doubts, or if your partner’s confusion seems genuine. This wasn’t an STD test, but I once had to get a drug test and I tested positive for PCP and methadone. The person who reviewed my results said: “I can tell just by the look on your face that this is a false positive.” They ran a second test and it was negative. . However, if your second test is negative, you are not the source of the infection. Your partner cheated, and they’re trying to convince you that you’re the one who gave it to them. STDs don’t come and go, only the symptoms do.
Here’s some good information about STDs and screening CDC Recommendations for Genital Herpes: https://www.cdc.gov/herpes/testing/index.html Planned Parenthood on How STD Testing Works: https://www.plannedparenthood.org/learn/stds-hiv-safer-sex/get-tested/how-does-std-testing-work STDs You Can Catch Without Having Sex: https://www.yoursexualhealth.co.uk/blog/surprising-stds-you-can-catch-without-having-sex/ Myths and Facts About Chlamydia: https://www.betterhealth.vic.gov.au/health/conditionsandtreatments/myths-and-facts-about-chlamydia The CDC and Gonorrhea: https://www.cdc.gov/gonorrhea/about/index.html STDs and Toilet Seats: https://hackensackmeridianhealth.org/en/healthier-you/2024/01/29/can-you-get-an-std-from-a-toilet-seat
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: And so it begins...
item.description: https://www.newsweek.com/france-pulls-all-gold-out-of-us-federal-reserve-11792591 I'm guessing Germany and the UK won't, but other countries will follow suit. It's coming: https://fortune.com/2026/03/23/us-government-insolvent-fiscal-crisis-fix/ You might want to buy some canned food and ramen noodles to stash away, just in case.

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @DaveSamsonite made this postcard to send to his grandson. Adorable.
27 Man Tax: Barack Obama
“The role of art isn't just to show life as it is, but to show life as it should be.” - Harry Belafonte So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator
